---
title: ""
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: false
    number_sections: false
    latex_engine: xelatex
geometry: "top=0.6in, bottom=0.8in, left=0.85in, right=0.85in"
fontsize: 10.5pt
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{fontspec}
  - \usepackage{fancyhdr}
  - \usepackage{graphicx}
  - \usepackage{xcolor}
  - \usepackage{mdframed}
  - \usepackage{booktabs}
  - \usepackage{array}
  - \usepackage{colortbl}
  - \usepackage{tabularx}
  - \usepackage{multirow}
  - \usepackage{enumitem}
  - \usepackage{tcolorbox}
  - \usepackage{hyperref}
  - \usepackage{parskip}
  - \usepackage{setspace}
  - \tcbuselibrary{skins,breakable}
  - \definecolor{ncicblue}{HTML}{0066CC}
  - \definecolor{ncicdark}{HTML}{0A1628}
  - \definecolor{ncicpurple}{HTML}{7C3AED}
  - \definecolor{ncicred}{HTML}{DC3545}
  - \definecolor{ncicorange}{HTML}{FD7E14}
  - \definecolor{ncicamber}{HTML}{FFC107}
  - \definecolor{ncicgreen}{HTML}{198754}
  - \definecolor{ncicdarkred}{HTML}{7B0000}
  - \definecolor{ncicgray}{HTML}{6C757D}
  - \definecolor{nciclight}{HTML}{F0F4F8}
  - \definecolor{warningbg}{HTML}{FFF8E1}
  - \definecolor{infobg}{HTML}{F0F9FF}
  - \definecolor{successbg}{HTML}{F0FFF4}
  - \pagestyle{fancy}
  - \fancyhf{}
  - \fancyhead[L]{\small\textcolor{ncicblue}{\textbf{Radicalisation Signals}}\;\textcolor{ncicgray}{| NCIC Cap 170 Intelligence Platform}}
  - \fancyhead[R]{\small\textcolor{ncicred}{\textbf{RESTRICTED}}\;\textcolor{ncicgray}{--- Not for Public Distribution}}
  - \fancyfoot[L]{\small\textcolor{ncicgray}{Noah Wamalwa \textbullet\ IEA Kenya NIRU AI Hackathon}}
  - \fancyfoot[R]{\small\textcolor{ncicgray}{\thepage}}
  - \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.6pt}
  - \renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0.3pt}
  - \setlength{\parskip}{5pt}
  - \setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE)
```

\begin{tcolorbox}[
  enhanced,
  colback=ncicdark,
  colframe=ncicblue,
  arc=6pt,
  boxrule=1.5pt,
  left=16pt, right=16pt, top=14pt, bottom=14pt
]
\begin{center}
{\fontsize{20}{24}\selectfont\bfseries\textcolor{white}{Radicalisation Signals}}\\[4pt]
{\fontsize{11}{14}\selectfont\textcolor{ncicblue!80!white}{AI Early Warning Platform for Kenya}}\\[6pt]
\textcolor{white!40!ncicdark}{\rule{0.6\textwidth}{0.3pt}}\\[5pt]
{\small\textcolor{white!70!ncicdark}{NCIC Act Cap 170\quad\textbullet\quad GPT-4o-mini + Human-in-the-Loop\quad\textbullet\quad 47 Counties}}\\[3pt]
{\small\textcolor{ncicblue!80!white}{\texttt{https://wnwamalwa.shinyapps.io/Radicalisation-Signals/}}}
\end{center}
\end{tcolorbox}

\vspace{0.3em}

\begin{tcolorbox}[enhanced, colback=warningbg, colframe=ncicorange, arc=4pt, boxrule=1pt, left=10pt, right=10pt, top=5pt, bottom=5pt]
\small\textbf{\textcolor{ncicred}{Important:}} AI classifications are analytical aids, not legal findings. All Level 4--5 classifications require independent officer validation and legal review before any action is taken. \textbf{This document is restricted and not for public distribution.}
\end{tcolorbox}

\vspace{0.4em}

\noindent\colorbox{ncicblue}{\parbox{\textwidth}{\vspace{3pt}\hspace{6pt}\textbf{\textcolor{white}{\large 1\quad Overview}}\vspace{3pt}}}

\vspace{0.3em}

\textbf{Radicalisation Signals} is an AI-assisted intelligence platform designed to support the \textbf{National Cohesion and Integration Commission (NCIC)} of Kenya in monitoring and analysing online content linked to hate speech, ethnic incitement, dehumanisation, and radicalisation. The platform enables \textbf{early detection of harmful narratives} across digital platforms, supporting timely, coordinated, and evidence-based interventions at both national and sub-county levels.

\begin{tcolorbox}[enhanced, colback=infobg, colframe=ncicblue, arc=4pt, boxrule=0.8pt, left=10pt, right=10pt, top=6pt, bottom=6pt]
\begin{tabular}{@{}p{3.0cm}p{10.2cm}@{}}
\textcolor{ncicblue}{\textbf{Signal ingestion}} & Twitter/X, Facebook, TikTok, Telegram, WhatsApp \\[2pt]
\textcolor{ncicblue}{\textbf{AI classification}} & GPT-4o-mini against the NCIC 6-level taxonomy under Cap 170 \\[2pt]
\textcolor{ncicblue}{\textbf{Risk scoring}} & Composite formula: AI confidence + keywords + network + source history \\[2pt]
\textcolor{ncicblue}{\textbf{Officer validation}} & Human-in-the-loop: Confirm, Escalate, Downgrade, or Clear \\[2pt]
\textcolor{ncicblue}{\textbf{Forecasting}} & 14-day county-level Prophet time-series escalation projections \\[2pt]
\textcolor{ncicblue}{\textbf{S13 Queue}} & L4/L5 cases tracked: Pending \textrightarrow\ Filed \textrightarrow\ DCI Alerted \textrightarrow\ Resolved \\[2pt]
\textcolor{ncicblue}{\textbf{Audit trail}} & Tamper-evident log of every officer action with timestamp and session ID \\[2pt]
\textcolor{ncicblue}{\textbf{Reporting}} & Excel exports: Quick Briefing, Detailed Report, NCIC Legal Report, County \\
\end{tabular}
\end{tcolorbox}

\vspace{0.5em}

\noindent\colorbox{ncicblue}{\parbox{\textwidth}{\vspace{3pt}\hspace{6pt}\textbf{\textcolor{white}{\large 2\quad Data Coverage}}\vspace{3pt}}}

\vspace{0.3em}

All \textbf{47 counties} of Kenya are covered using real \textbf{IEBC administrative boundaries}, with signals attributed to specific sub-locations enabling targeted community-level interventions. The platform operates on a \textbf{rolling 30-day window} --- all historical cases are automatically re-scored whenever keyword weights are refined through officer validation.

\vspace{0.3em}

\noindent\begin{minipage}[t]{0.47\textwidth}
\small\textbf{\textcolor{ncicblue}{Platform Coverage}}\\[3pt]
\begin{tabular}{@{}p{1.7cm}p{4.4cm}@{}}
\toprule
\textbf{Platform} & \textbf{Relevance} \\
\midrule
Twitter/X   & High-velocity; incitement breaks here first \\
Facebook    & Community groups, electoral mobilisation \\
TikTok      & Youth-targeted radicalisation content \\
Telegram    & Encrypted coordinated distribution \\
WhatsApp    & Primary Kenya channel; misinformation \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{minipage}
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.49\textwidth}
\small\textbf{\textcolor{ncicpurple}{Language Coverage \& Detection}}\\[3pt]
\begin{tabular}{@{}p{1.7cm}p{4.6cm}@{}}
\toprule
\textbf{Language} & \textbf{Detection method} \\
\midrule
Swahili/English & GPT-4o-mini detection \\
Sheng           & GPT + urban slang glossary \\
Kikuyu          & GPT + hate-speech glossary \\
Kalenjin        & GPT + PEV-era rhetoric hints \\
Luo             & GPT + expulsion marker glossary \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{minipage}

\vspace{0.3em}
\begin{tcolorbox}[enhanced, colback=successbg, colframe=ncicgreen, arc=3pt, boxrule=0.6pt, left=8pt, right=8pt, top=4pt, bottom=4pt]
\small\textbf{\textcolor{ncicgreen}{Language-aware classification:}} GPT-4o-mini detects the language of each post before classification. Kikuyu, Kalenjin, Luo, and Sheng posts receive language-specific glossaries of known hate-speech terms injected directly into the classification prompt --- improving accuracy on Kenya's linguistically diverse content.
\end{tcolorbox}

\vspace{0.5em}

\noindent\colorbox{ncicblue}{\parbox{\textwidth}{\vspace{3pt}\hspace{6pt}\textbf{\textcolor{white}{\large 3\quad The NCIC 6-Level Classification Taxonomy}}\vspace{3pt}}}

\vspace{0.3em}

All content is classified against Cap 170 on a six-point scale. Levels 0--1 are \textbf{protected speech}. Levels 4--5 cross the \textbf{Section 13 legal threshold}.

\vspace{0.2em}

\noindent\begin{tabular}{@{}p{0.4cm}p{3.1cm}p{8.3cm}p{1.4cm}@{}}
\toprule
\textbf{L} & \textbf{Label} & \textbf{Recommended Action} & \textbf{S13} \\
\midrule
\rowcolor{ncicgreen!15}
\textbf{0} & Neutral Discussion & No action. Log for trend analysis. & --- \\
\rowcolor{ncicgreen!8}
\textbf{1} & Offensive Language & Monitor. Flag for weekly review. & --- \\
\rowcolor{ncicamber!25}
\textbf{2} & Prejudice / Stereotyping & Document pattern. Request platform review if repeated. & --- \\
\rowcolor{ncicorange!20}
\textbf{3} & Dehumanization & Issue monitoring flag. Initiate engagement with poster. & --- \\
\rowcolor{ncicred!18}
\textbf{4} & \textbf{Hate Speech} & \textbf{Section 13 threshold met. Require takedown. Alert DCI.} & \textcolor{ncicred}{\textbf{YES}} \\
\rowcolor{ncicdarkred!18}
\textbf{5} & \textbf{Toxic} & \textbf{IMMEDIATE ESCALATION. Press charges. Contact DCI now.} & \textcolor{ncicred}{\textbf{YES}} \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}

\vspace{0.5em}

\noindent\colorbox{ncicblue}{\parbox{\textwidth}{\vspace{3pt}\hspace{6pt}\textbf{\textcolor{white}{\large 4\quad Classification Methodology \& Risk Scoring}}\vspace{3pt}}}

\vspace{0.3em}

\textbf{Three-Stage Decision Chain}

\vspace{0.2em}
\noindent\begin{tcolorbox}[enhanced, colback=ncicred!8, colframe=ncicred, arc=3pt, boxrule=0.7pt, left=8pt, right=8pt, top=4pt, bottom=4pt]
\small\textbf{\textcolor{ncicred}{Stage 1 --- Violence Override (unconditional):}} Any call to kill, attack, burn, or physically harm --- regardless of target --- immediately classifies L4/L5. Activism test blocked. \textit{Examples: 'Chinja wote' \textrightarrow\ L5. 'Mpige risasi' \textrightarrow\ L5.}
\end{tcolorbox}
\vspace{0.15em}
\noindent\begin{tcolorbox}[enhanced, colback=ncicorange!8, colframe=ncicorange, arc=3pt, boxrule=0.7pt, left=8pt, right=8pt, top=4pt, bottom=4pt]
\small\textbf{\textcolor{ncicorange}{Stage 2 --- Target Test:}} Is the target a \textit{protected group} (ethnic, religious, regional) or a \textit{public official}? Criticism of officials defaults to L0/L1 --- political accountability is constitutionally protected.
\end{tcolorbox}
\vspace{0.15em}
\noindent\begin{tcolorbox}[enhanced, colback=ncicgreen!8, colframe=ncicgreen, arc=3pt, boxrule=0.7pt, left=8pt, right=8pt, top=4pt, bottom=4pt]
\small\textbf{\textcolor{ncicgreen}{Stage 3 --- Intent Test:}} Accountability ('vote out', 'resign') \textrightarrow\ L0/L1. Exclusion ('waende') \textrightarrow\ L3/L4. Dehumanisation ('they are vermin') \textrightarrow\ L3+. Mobilisation \textrightarrow\ L4.
\end{tcolorbox}

\vspace{0.4em}

\textbf{Risk Score Formula}

$$\text{Risk} = 0.55 \times \text{composite} + 0.45 \times \text{NCIC\_base}$$
$$\text{composite} = 0.30 \times \text{conf} + 0.22 \times \text{kw} + 0.13 \times \text{net} + 0.08 \times \text{spike} + 0.12 \times \text{ctx} + 0.15 \times \text{src\_hist}$$

\vspace{0.2em}

\noindent\begin{tabular}{@{}p{1.8cm}p{0.9cm}p{10cm}@{}}
\toprule
\textbf{Component} & \textbf{Wt} & \textbf{Description} \\
\midrule
\texttt{conf}       & 30\% & GPT-4o-mini self-reported certainty (0--100). Largest single driver. \\
\texttt{kw}         & 22\% & Adaptive keyword score --- updates on every officer validation. \\
\texttt{net}        & 13\% & Network exposure --- estimated reach and amplification risk. \\
\texttt{spike}      & 8\%  & Frequency spike above county baseline. \\
\texttt{ctx}        & 12\% & Contextual factors flagged by GPT (each factor = +8 pts). \\
\texttt{src\_hist}  & 15\% & Handle/county posting pattern over 30 days (capped +30). \\
\texttt{NCIC\_base} & 45\% & Fixed base per level: L0=2, L1=15, L2=30, L3=55, L4=72, L5=92. \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}

\vspace{0.4em}

\textbf{Worked Examples --- L0 to L5}

\vspace{0.15em}

\noindent\begin{tcolorbox}[enhanced, colback=ncicgreen!10, colframe=ncicgreen, arc=3pt, boxrule=0.6pt, left=8pt, right=8pt, top=3pt, bottom=3pt, title={\small\textbf{\textcolor{white}{L0 Neutral --- Score: 14 --- No action}}}, colbacktitle=ncicgreen]
\small\textit{"Heshima kwa wote, hakuna kabila bora kuliko lingine"}\newline
\texttt{\footnotesize base(2) + 0.30x95 + 0.22x0 + 0.13x10 + 0.12x0 + 0.15x0 = \textbf{14}}
\end{tcolorbox}
\vspace{0.1em}
\noindent\begin{tcolorbox}[enhanced, colback=ncicamber!15, colframe=ncicamber!80!black, arc=3pt, boxrule=0.6pt, left=8pt, right=8pt, top=3pt, bottom=3pt, title={\small\textbf{L1 Offensive --- Score: 22 --- Monitor}}, colbacktitle=ncicamber!80!black, coltitle=white]
\small\textit{"These politicians are useless thieves, all of them"}\newline
\texttt{\footnotesize base(15) + 0.30x80 + 0.22x10 + 0.13x20 + 0.12x0 + 0.15x0 = \textbf{22}}
\end{tcolorbox}
\vspace{0.1em}
\noindent\begin{tcolorbox}[enhanced, colback=ncicorange!10, colframe=ncicorange, arc=3pt, boxrule=0.6pt, left=8pt, right=8pt, top=3pt, bottom=3pt, title={\small\textbf{\textcolor{white}{L2 Prejudice --- Score: 36 --- Document pattern}}}, colbacktitle=ncicorange]
\small\textit{"Kabila fulani hawastahili nafasi katika serikali"}\newline
\texttt{\footnotesize base(30) + 0.30x78 + 0.22x20 + 0.13x25 + 0.12x8 + 0.15x0 = \textbf{36}}
\end{tcolorbox}
\vspace{0.1em}
\noindent\begin{tcolorbox}[enhanced, colback=ncicorange!20, colframe=ncicorange!80!ncicred, arc=3pt, boxrule=0.6pt, left=8pt, right=8pt, top=3pt, bottom=3pt, title={\small\textbf{\textcolor{white}{L3 Dehumanization --- Score: 56 --- Monitoring flag}}}, colbacktitle=ncicorange!80!ncicred]
\small\textit{"Watu wa kabila hiyo ni kama magonjwa --- wanaharibu nchi yetu"}\newline
\texttt{\footnotesize base(55) + 0.30x82 + 0.22x28 + 0.13x40 + 0.12x16 + 0.15x0 = \textbf{56}}
\end{tcolorbox}
\vspace{0.1em}
\noindent\begin{tcolorbox}[enhanced, colback=ncicred!10, colframe=ncicred, arc=3pt, boxrule=0.8pt, left=8pt, right=8pt, top=3pt, bottom=3pt, title={\small\textbf{\textcolor{white}{L4 Hate Speech --- Score: 73 --- Section 13 --- Takedown. Alert DCI}}}, colbacktitle=ncicred]
\small\textit{"Waende kwao --- hawastahili kuishi hapa Kenya yetu"}\newline
\texttt{\footnotesize base(72) + 0.30x85 + 0.22x30 + 0.13x60 + 0.12x16 + 0.15x0 = \textbf{73}}
\end{tcolorbox}
\vspace{0.1em}
\noindent\begin{tcolorbox}[enhanced, colback=ncicdarkred!10, colframe=ncicdarkred, arc=3pt, boxrule=1pt, left=8pt, right=8pt, top=3pt, bottom=3pt, title={\small\textbf{\textcolor{white}{L5 Toxic --- Score: 91 --- Section 13 --- IMMEDIATE ESCALATION. Press charges}}}, colbacktitle=ncicdarkred]
\small\textit{"Chinja wote wa kabila hiyo --- tutawaonyesha nguvu kesho"}\newline
\texttt{\footnotesize base(92) + 0.30x96 + 0.22x45 + 0.13x80 + 0.12x24 + 0.15x20 = \textbf{91}}
\end{tcolorbox}

\vspace{0.5em}

\noindent\colorbox{ncicblue}{\parbox{\textwidth}{\vspace{3pt}\hspace{6pt}\textbf{\textcolor{white}{\large 5\quad Safeguards and Responsible Use}}\vspace{3pt}}}

\vspace{0.3em}

\noindent\begin{tabular}{@{}p{0.3cm}p{3.4cm}p{9.5cm}@{}}
\textbf{1} & \textbf{Mandatory human review} & No legal action triggered by AI alone. Every L2+ requires officer decision. \\[2pt]
\textbf{2} & \textbf{Activism protection} & 3-stage chain protects political accountability speech from misclassification. \\[2pt]
\textbf{3} & \textbf{Continuous re-calibration} & Keyword weights updated on every validation. All cases auto-rescored. \\[2pt]
\textbf{4} & \textbf{Deterministic output} & \texttt{temperature=0} --- same post always returns same classification. \\[2pt]
\textbf{5} & \textbf{Schema-constrained} & GPT returns strict JSON only --- no free-text hallucination possible. \\[2pt]
\textbf{6} & \textbf{Confidence scoring} & Below 60\% flagged LOW --- officer alerted to model uncertainty. \\[2pt]
\textbf{7} & \textbf{Language-aware} & Kikuyu/Kalenjin/Luo/Sheng glossaries injected into classification prompt. \\[2pt]
\textbf{8} & \textbf{Session security} & bcrypt credentials, RBAC, 20-min timeout, supervisor email, audit log. \\[2pt]
\textbf{9} & \textbf{S13 escalation queue} & Confirmed L4/L5 cases tracked through legal workflow to DCI referral. \\[2pt]
\textbf{10} & \textbf{Cross-session sync} & SQLite WAL mode; officer decisions sync across sessions every 5 seconds. \\
\end{tabular}

\vspace{0.5em}

\noindent\colorbox{ncicblue}{\parbox{\textwidth}{\vspace{3pt}\hspace{6pt}\textbf{\textcolor{white}{\large 6\quad Target Users, Outcomes \& Value Proposition}}\vspace{3pt}}}

\vspace{0.3em}

\noindent\begin{minipage}[t]{0.46\textwidth}
\small\textbf{\textcolor{ncicblue}{Target Users}}\\[3pt]
\begin{tabular}{@{}p{2.6cm}p{3.5cm}@{}}
\toprule
\textbf{User Group} & \textbf{Primary Use} \\
\midrule
NCIC Officers      & Validate, escalate, act \\
Govt Analysts      & Strategic oversight \\
Security Agencies  & Operational coordination \\
Researchers / CSOs & Evidence-based advocacy \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}\\[6pt]
\small\textbf{\textcolor{ncicblue}{Supporting Institutions (Proposed)}}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=10pt, itemsep=1pt, topsep=2pt]
  \small\item National Intelligence Service (NIS)
  \item Anti-Terrorism Police Unit (ATPU)
  \item Communications Authority of Kenya
  \item National Intelligence \& Research University (NIRU)
  \item United Nations Development Programme (UNDP)
\end{itemize}
\end{minipage}
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.50\textwidth}
\small\textbf{\textcolor{ncicblue}{Expected Outcomes}}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=10pt, itemsep=2pt, topsep=2pt]
  \small\item Early detection of harmful narratives before escalation
  \item County and sub-county hotspot identification
  \item Improved inter-agency coordination
  \item Data-driven policy formulation
  \item Strengthened national cohesion capacity
\end{itemize}
\vspace{0.3em}
\begin{tcolorbox}[enhanced, colback=ncicpurple!8, colframe=ncicpurple, arc=4pt, boxrule=0.8pt, left=8pt, right=8pt, top=6pt, bottom=6pt]
\small\textbf{\textcolor{ncicpurple}{Value Proposition}}\\[3pt]
This platform enables Kenya to shift from \textbf{reactive response} to \textbf{proactive, geographically targeted prevention} --- using AI to support national action within a legal, human-rights-compliant framework anchored in Cap 170.
\end{tcolorbox}
\end{minipage}

\vspace{0.8em}

\begin{tcolorbox}[enhanced, colback=ncicdark, colframe=ncicblue, arc=4pt, boxrule=0.8pt, left=10pt, right=10pt, top=6pt, bottom=6pt]
\begin{center}
\small\textcolor{white}{\textbf{Noah Wamalwa} \textbullet\ Project Lead / Developer}\\[2pt]
\small\textcolor{ncicblue!80!white}{Radicalisation Signals v5 \textbullet\ NCIC Cap 170 \textbullet\ GPT-4o-mini + Human-in-the-Loop \textbullet\ 47 Counties \textbullet\ Kenya}\\[1pt]
\small\textcolor{white!55!ncicdark}{Language-aware classification \textbullet\ Prophet time-series forecast \textbullet\ bcrypt auth \textbullet\ S13 escalation queue}\\[3pt]
\small\textcolor{ncicblue!70!white}{\textit{Developed for the IEA Kenya NIRU AI Hackathon \textbullet\ `r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %Y')`}}
\end{center}
\end{tcolorbox}
